2356870.name: Huddle Genius
2356870.description:
🧠 Huddle Genius – The Ultimate NFL Best Ball Draft Assistant

Take your NFL Best Ball drafting to the next level with Huddle Genius, the most customizable and data-driven draft assistant on the market. Whether you're a strategic optimizer or a casual competitor, Huddle Genius provides powerful tools to guide every decision from pick #1 to your final sleeper.

💾 Your Data. Your Rules. No Subscriptions.
Huddle Genius is powered entirely by your own data—not locked behind any paywall or recurring fees. Import your tiers, ADP rankings, and exposure data directly into the app and let the system build everything from there. No online dependencies, no subscriptions, and no usage tracking. This is a true Best Ball tool suite that runs fully on your PC, giving you complete control over your draft strategy and analysis.

📊 Draft Room Advisor
Dominate your draft room with a single click.
The Draft Room Advisor automatically generates a smart, dynamic playbook for your entire draft – optimizing for stacks, soft targets, quarterback pairings, exposure limits, and even shared exposure logic. Built on a tier-based system that respects ADP expectations, it balances aggressive strategy with intelligent risk management. Draft with purpose.

Important: This program is designed to work with 18-pick Underdog Fantasy Best Ball Drafts OR 20-pick DraftKings Best Ball Drafts. We now additionally support the Drafters site. No other format is currently supported.

🧠 How Does Huddle Genius Work?

Huddle Genius does not live-sync with your drafts. Instead, it generates a filtered list of recommended players based on ADP projections for your upcoming pick. This list is curated using your positional goals, tiers, stacking preferences, strategy settings, exposure limits, and many other customizable factors.

When drafting, simply refer to the list and select the top available player on your drafting site. That’s it — no syncing or plugins required.

Due to its design, we highly recommend using two monitors or two devices to draft effectively with Huddle Genius running alongside your draft platform.

🔍 Insights
Discover the story behind your strategy.
Our Insights dashboard breaks down your drafting habits, tendencies, and exposures like never before. Track:

  • Your most frequent player combinations

  • The percentage of draft strategies used across your teams

  • Where you've invested the most draft capital (team by team)

Whether you're fine-tuning for ROI or just curious about your biases – this is your data playground.

🎛️ Customization
Built with flexibility at its core.
Every aspect of Huddle Genius is customizable – from player roles (e.g., rushing QB or pass-catching RB) to tier creation and stack targeting logic. The Preferences interface provides a graphical tool to configure your ideal draft behavior.

Set your own rules:

  • Prefer stack-heavy builds or positional balance?

  • How many stacks per QB?

  • How far past ADP are you willing to reach?

  • How many bye week overlaps are acceptable per position?

  • Want to prioritize Week 15? 17? 4? You decide.

👤 Players Panel
Manage your players directly in-app.
The Players section lets you view and manage your entire player pool within the GUI. You can tag players with specific characteristics – such as Rushing Quarterbacks, Receiving Backs, or Faded Players – and your preferences will be respected throughout every draft.

⬇️ Get Tiers
Instantly download curated tiers.
The Get Tiers section allows you to download web-hosted curated tiers in one click. Of course, you can still manually add your own tiers by placing CSVs in your folders. The choice is yours!

🧠 Built-in Strategies
From Hero RB to Zero RB and everything in between.
Huddle Genius includes a variety of built-in positional strategies. Control how often each one appears, test them side-by-side, and refine your drafting identity with real results.

👥 Multiple Profiles
Share the program without conflict.
With support for up to 8 user profiles, Huddle Genius allows multiple drafters to share the same PC while keeping data, preferences, and settings totally separate.

📘 Help & Support
Never draft alone.
Our comprehensive Help System includes detailed screenshots, directory-based readme files, and active participation in the Steam Community to get you the answers you need – fast.

Ready to outsmart your draft room?
Install Huddle Genius and bring strategy to the huddle.
